title: Idhayam
desc: A shy woman from a small town falls for a wealthy tycoon but struggles to express her feelings. Subsequently, she tries to overcome her insecurities.

title: Annamalai Kudumbam
desc: Vennila, with her traditional character, catches Annamalai's eye as a potential wife for her son, Varun, until Vaanmathy, Vennila's sister, threatens to unravel everything.

title: Salangai Oli
desc: Tragedy orphans Bhoomi and Gagan. Bhoomi yearns to find her roots, while Gagan resents his father. However, as their paths cross, truth will pave the way to hope.

title: Aval Varuvala
desc: Divya rejects Jeeva's love due to her traumatic past, revealing her psycho husband. Just as she agrees to marry Jeeva, her husband resurfaces, complicating her life.

title: Gettimelam
desc: Sivaraman and Lakshmi aspire to build their dream house and get their daughter married into a good family. However, the middle-aged couple struggles to make ends meet.

title: Veera
desc: Veera and Kanmani's brother dies in an accident. Veera marries the driver, Maaran. Kanmani wants revenge. The story follows what happens next in this tragic story.

title: Chinnan Siru Kiliye
desc: The independent woman in Indhu clashes with the patriarchal idealist in Karna, unleashing a storm the empire never saw coming.

title: Thirumangalyam
desc: Lakshmi, an orphan subjected to her stepmother's cruelty, briefly tastes the promise of a better life upon meeting Thiru, before circumstances conspire to crush her hopes once more.

title: Parijadam
desc: After a tragic accident leaves Isai orphaned, her aunt Rukmini fakes her horoscope to satisfy Subadra's rigid astrological demands and secure a marriage to Vishal.

title: Ayali
desc: Ayali's family shunned her due to false accusations. She endures her stepmom's cruelty and joins Siva. They plan to expose Varma, proving her mother's innocence, seeking justice and family reunion.

title: Karthigai Deepam
desc: Deepa, a talented woman, faces discrimination due to her complexion. However, her life changes when she meets Karthikeyan, a businessman.

title: Vaagai Sooda Vaa
desc: Sumathi raises her daughters Thenmozhi and Meenakshi with care and diligence. Subsequently, Thenmozhi weds into Mano's financially troubled household.

title: Sandhya Raagam
desc: After the tragic loss of her sister, Sandhya, Janaki becomes the guardian of her niece, Maya. However, Maya's modern approach starts to influence Janaki's daughter.

title: Varisu
desc: Savvy businesswoman Janakambal enlists Tamil to reform her wayward grandson Cibi, hoping he'll prove worthy of inheriting her empire.
